completed_tasks.name: Fix /q layer: multi-fragment — exclude uncharged fragments (CuSO4 O- issue)
Fix /p layer: use mobile-H sites from /h layer as primary source, heteroatom fallback
Fix /q layer: prefer formally-charged atoms in struct, fall back to whole fragment
Fix /q single-fragment: Object.values(auxMap) fallback to avoid count mismatch (thiamine)

remaining_tasks.name: Browser-verify /q+1 on thiamine cation — was 'nothing happens', fix committed
Browser-verify /q+2; on CuSO4 — should highlight Cu only, not sulfate O- atoms
Browser-verify /p-2 on CuSO4 — should highlight sulfate oxygens only, not Cu or S

human_actions_pending.action: Browser-verify all three cases above (thiamine q+1, CuSO4 q+2, CuSO4 p-2)
human_actions_pending.context: Root cause of thiamine 'nothing happens' could not be confirmed from static analysis; fix is robust (Object.values(auxMap)) but needs browser confirmation

decisions.decision: q-layer single-fragment: Object.values(auxMap) as fallback instead of auxMap[1..fragCount] loop
decisions.rationale: The count-based loop silently returned nothing if formulaFragmentCounts disagreed with actual auxMap keys; Object.values(auxMap) is unconditionally correct for single-fragment

decisions.decision: q-layer multi-fragment: formula-range approach to exclude uncharged fragments
decisions.rationale: CuSO4 /q+2; must not highlight sulfate O- atoms in the uncharged fragment

decisions.decision: q-layer: prefer formally-charged atoms from struct over all fragment atoms
decisions.rationale: Highlights the specific atom bearing the charge (e.g. quaternary N in thiamine) rather than the whole molecule

decisions.decision: p-layer: primary source is mobile-H sites from /h layer; fallback is all heteroatoms
decisions.rationale: Mobile-H sites are the actual protonation sites; heteroatom fallback handles molecules without mobile-H notation

next_action: Browser-verify /q+1 on thiamine. If still broken, add console.log in buildHighlightSpecs case 'q' to inspect poolCharges, fragPoolIds, and Object.values(auxMap) at hover time.
context_notes: All 174 tests pass. Session explored /p vs /q InChI semantics (mobile vs fixed charge). CuSO4 is the canonical multi-fragment test case. Thiamine cation is the canonical single-fragment q-layer test case.
